text.tspan: Each rank holds local gradient chunks
N-1 steps to reduce and scatter partial results
Each rank holds ONE fully reduced chunk
N-1 steps to broadcast reduced chunks to all ranks
All ranks hold complete reduced gradient

g.text: Data Distribution (N=4 ranks, 4 chunks per rank)

text.tspan: Each step: Send chunk (rank-step) mod N to right neighbor
Receive from left neighbor and REDUCE into chunk (rank-step-1) mod N
• Each rank has exactly ONE complete reduction
• Total data per rank: 1/N of original
Each step: Send chunk (rank-step+1) mod N
Receive chunk (rank-step) mod N (no reduction, just copy)
• Every rank has ALL reduced chunks
• Synchronized gradient ready for optimizer step
